assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly separates Phase 1 (L4 inference pool) and Phase 2 (A100 pool) with distinct upgrade strategies and timing considerations

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Explicitly configures max-surge-upgrade=2 and max-unavailable-upgrade=1 for the L4 inference pool upgrade

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Mentions 'GPU Driver Compatibility: Verify NVIDIA driver compatibility between versions' in key considerations and includes GPU driver validation in post-upgrade steps

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Provides coordination script to check for active fine-tuning jobs and wait for completion, plus timing recommendations for A100 pool during planned maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: While the response mentions 'Model Warmup: Account for model loading time on new nodes', it does not explicitly state that GPU VMs don't support live migration or that pods will restart causing latency spikes

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Provides specific PDB configurations for inference workloads with minAvailable: 80% to maintain capacity during upgrades

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions 'The cluster autoscaler will automatically provision new 1.32 nodes as old nodes are cordoned' in key considerations

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: While it mentions verifying NVIDIA driver compatibility, it does not specifically recommend testing in staging environment before production upgrade
